evals.name: new-pass-p-compound-splitter
evals.prompt: add a new Pass P that splits 20+ character Finnish compound words at syllable or morpheme boundaries so Grandmom reads them as two words instead of one mushy blob. we have 576 unique long compounds in the Rubicon test book. start with a seam lexicon, libvoikko integration can come later. make sure it goes in the right place in the pipeline ordering.
evals.expected_output: A new _pass_P(text) function added to src/tts_normalizer_fi.py with a seam lexicon. Wired into normalize_finnish_text AFTER Pass I and H (both operate on num2words output too). New invariants entry in the dispatcher docstring explaining why P runs after I/H. Tests added in tests/test_tts_normalizer_fi.py: 3+ positive examples, 1 negative (short compound should NOT split), 1 ordering test. docs/tts_text_normalization_cases.md gets a new Pass P subsection. Single conventional commit feat(normalizer): add Pass P for long-compound splitting.

evals.name: extend-pass-i-lexicon
evals.prompt: add humanismi, egoismi, patriotismi, and liberalismi to the Pass I loanword respelling lexicon. they all need the same -ismi → -is-mi split.
evals.expected_output: Lexicon entries added to the Pass I table in src/tts_normalizer_fi.py in alphabetical order with the -is-mi split form. Tests added for each of the 4 words in tests/test_tts_normalizer_fi.py. No ordering changes, no new pass, no docs churn beyond maybe a one-line note. Single commit feat(normalizer): extend Pass I loanword lexicon with -ismi variants.

evals.name: debug-page-range
evals.prompt: bug: the normalizer turns `s. 42-45` into `sivu kaksineljäkymmentäviisi` — it's consuming the dash but keeping the digits glued together. should be `sivu 42 45` first so Pass G can inflect each endpoint separately. figure out which pass is wrong and fix.
evals.expected_output: Assistant reproduces the bug by running the pipeline, bisects to identify whether Pass E is emitting its output in a form Pass D's range-splitter can no longer see, or whether D is ordered wrong relative to E. Fix is either a regex tweak in E or a reordering note; either way the invariants docstring is updated in the same commit. Regression test added that asserts 's. 42-45' → 'sivu neljäkymmentäkaksi neljäkymmentäviisi' (or similar correct form).
